prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! You've been putting it off, but that means you've been building up momentum. You're ready to tackle it now. Take a deep breath, focus on the task at hand, and remember that it's okay to take it one step at a time. You're capable and strong, and you can do this. Go crush it!
